description: Reviewed bespoke gate failures for fields_missing.php. Matching entries render as [SKIP][fail][reviewed] (informational — same exit semantics as [SKIP][fail]).

backup_tape_log.reason: Monthly grid bespoke UI intentionally omits flattened CRUD list search, sort, and pagination.

checks.note: Table in index.php missing search wiring: GET/search variable, search input, server-side search conditions
Table in index.php missing sort wiring: GET/sort variable, ASC/DESC direction, ORDER BY sort wiring, sortable header indicators (▲/▼ or $nextDir)
Table in index.php missing pagination wiring: itm_resolve_records_per_page(), $perPage, LIMIT/OFFSET paging, page query state, page navigation controls, total row/page count

company_module_access.reason: Admin company × module matrix is not a flattened CRUD list: rows are all registry modules sorted by slug; matrix search is in-memory on slug/name only. Registry flat list (`list_all`) is auxiliary.

checks.note: Table in index.php missing sort wiring: GET/sort variable, ASC/DESC direction, ORDER BY sort wiring, sortable header indicators (▲/▼ or $nextDir)
Table in index.php missing pagination wiring: itm_resolve_records_per_page(), $perPage, LIMIT/OFFSET paging, page query state, page navigation controls, total row/page count

ops_report.reason: Daily hotel operations report uses day/month/year selectors and opr_ensure_report() auto-create — not a flattened CRUD list. create.php is a wrapper to index.php; no list search/sort/pagination or primary ➕ create link.

checks.note: Table in index.php missing search wiring: GET/search variable, search input, server-side search conditions, search reset control (emoji-only 🔙 on <a>, not plain Clear or other text)
Table in index.php missing sort wiring: GET/sort variable, ASC/DESC direction, ORDER BY sort wiring, sortable header indicators (▲/▼ or $nextDir)
Table in index.php missing pagination wiring: itm_resolve_records_per_page(), $perPage, LIMIT/OFFSET paging, page query state, total row/page count
create.php exists but index.php has no detectable primary create/add action

switch_ports.reason: Switch port delete must hard DELETE with IDF sync (idf_ports, idf_links). Scaffold soft-delete would leave orphaned infrastructure rows; list has no deleted_at filter because rows are removed.

checks.note: switch_ports bespoke gate: delete uses hard DELETE (expected itm_crud_build_soft_delete_sql soft-delete)
switch_ports bespoke gate: list query missing deleted_at IS NULL filter (or itm_crud_append_not_deleted_predicate)

tickets.reason: Ticket create/edit intentionally expose business Created By (`created_by_employee_id` dropdown) and ticket logged-at (`created_at` datetime-local) — not scaffold audit meta; audit `created_by`/`updated_by` remain server-stamped on save.

checks.check: Excluded audit meta on create/edit forms
checks.note: tickets excluded UI column created_by: visible on create/edit forms

checks.check: Excluded audit meta on create/edit forms
checks.note: tickets excluded UI column created_at: visible on create/edit forms

vlans.reason: VLAN delete must hard DELETE when clearing switch_ports, idf_ports, and ip_subnets references. Scaffold soft-delete would leave orphaned network FKs; list has no deleted_at filter because rows are removed.

checks.note: vlans bespoke gate: delete uses hard DELETE (expected itm_crud_build_soft_delete_sql soft-delete)
vlans bespoke gate: list query missing deleted_at IS NULL filter (or itm_crud_append_not_deleted_predicate)
